'''Russ Jarib''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked for the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] as an intelligence agent. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he was assigned to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kirima (Kalinda system)|Kirima]] under [[Kora Primo]], the head of CSA intelligence on Kirima.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Den of Spies|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
